---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement
title: "feat: "
labels: [enhancement]
assignees: []
---

## Outcome
What should exist after this work?

## Why it matters
What user, product, or technical problem does this solve?

## Scope
- [ ] app
- [ ] domain logic
- [ ] backend / Supabase
- [ ] docs / process

## Acceptance hints
How will we know this is done?

## Risks / dependencies
What could block or complicate this?
